summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for FinAI Arabic RTL Auditor Dashboard. All 13 features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Django template-based frontend with Arabic RTL layout, data-rich tables, and minimal design working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page renders in Arabic RTL with email/password inputs
Login functionality works with admin@finai.com / admin123
Invalid login shows Arabic error message
Dashboard shows stats: 0 documents, 50 transactions, 16 accounts, 4 findings, 10 anomalies, 75% compliance score
Dashboard shows compliance summary (ZATCA: 10 checks, VAT: 1 reconciliation, Zakat: 124997.20 SAR)
Dashboard shows recent audit findings (4 findings with risk levels)
Dashboard shows anomalous transactions (5 transactions)
Dashboard shows recent transactions table (10 transactions)
Navigation bar in Arabic with all 6 menu items (Dashboard, Compliance, Findings, Transactions, Accounts, Reports)
Compliance overview page shows scores (91% overall, 100% ZATCA, 85% VAT, 90% Zakat)
Compliance overview shows ZATCA invoices table (10 invoices)
Compliance overview shows VAT reconciliations table
Compliance overview shows Zakat calculation details
Compliance overview shows regulatory references
Audit findings list page with filters (risk level, type, status)
Audit findings list shows 4 findings with risk level badges
Audit finding detail page shows description, impact, recommendation, AI analysis, regulatory reference
Transactions page with filters (type, anomaly, date range)
Transactions page shows 50 transactions with data table
Anomaly filter correctly filters anomalous transactions (10 anomalies)
Accounts page shows type summary (Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Revenue, Expenses)
Accounts page shows 16 accounts with balances
Arabic audit report page with print button
Arabic report shows executive summary, findings breakdown, conclusion
Logout functionality works correctly
RTL direction correctly applied across all pages
IBM Plex Sans Arabic font correctly applied
Navigation bar and footer present on all authenticated pages
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded: 50 transactions, 16 accounts, 4 findings, 10 ZATCA invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. Django template-based frontend with Arabic RTL layout. Login with admin@finai.com/admin123. All pages accessible: Dashboard (/), Compliance (/compliance/), Findings (/findings/), Transactions (/transactions/), Accounts (/accounts/), Arabic Report (/report/arabic/). Filters work on findings and transactions pages. Finding detail pages accessible via clicking on finding titles.

design_review.rtl_layout: Correctly implemented with dir='rtl' and lang='ar'
design_review.typography: IBM Plex Sans Arabic font applied
design_review.color_scheme: Minimal colors - slate-800 nav, slate-50 background, appropriate risk level colors
design_review.tables: Data-dense tables with proper Arabic headers and RTL alignment
design_review.navigation: 6 menu items in Arabic, active state highlighting
design_review.contrast: Good contrast throughout - dark nav on light background, readable text
